records.title: Canary telemetry vocabulary
records.summary: Synthetic canary vocabulary defines the labels provider, validation outcome, retry count, and fallback use. It exists only to exercise bounded relationship telemetry.

records.title: Canary metrics reference
records.summary: Synthetic canary metrics reference explains how the bounded telemetry vocabulary is exposed for a relationship extraction. It is a non-sensitive test record.

records.title: Canary seasonal palette
records.summary: Synthetic color swatches describe a neutral seasonal palette for an imaginary poster. This record contains no operational guidance.

records.title: Canary archival index
records.summary: Synthetic archive labels describe a fictional box-numbering convention for paper folders. This record is intentionally unrelated to colors.

records.title: Canary fallback vocabulary
records.summary: Synthetic canary vocabulary names a retry and a fallback as bounded telemetry events. It deliberately contains no provider instruction or prompt-like content.

records.title: Canary fallback reference
records.summary: Synthetic canary reference describes observing retry and fallback attribution without requesting a malformed model response. It is safe test content.
